'''Kamma''' was the son of [[Moisture farmer/Legends|moisture farmers]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] with two siblings: A [[Unidentified skiff guard|brother]] who became a [[Skiff guard/Legends|skiff guard]] for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] and [[Shaara]], who performed a "[[Droid/Legends|droid]]" act in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]]. He was killed when [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] were chasing Shaara.
